title: 你找到房子了吗？
pinyin: Nǐ zhǎo dào fáng zi le ma?
description_uz: «Uy topdingmi?» — uy ijarasi haqidagi ikki do'stning suhbati. Bu dialog ijara platformalari, narxlar, joylashuv, bir oylik ijara narxi, uy egasi bilan bog'lanish va onlayn uy ko'rishni muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Ты нашёл квартиру?» — разговор двух друзей об аренде жилья. Диалог тренирует, как обсудить платформы аренды, цены, расположение, стоимость аренды за месяц, связь с хозяином и онлайн-просмотр квартиры. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Have you found a place?» — a chat between two friends about renting. This dialogue practices talking about rental platforms, prices, location, monthly rent, contacting the landlord, and viewing a place online. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhǎo dào fáng zi le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you found a place yet?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还在找，我在租房平台看。
sentences.pinyin: Hái zài zhǎo, wǒ zài zū fáng píng tái kàn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё ищу, смотрю на платформе аренды жилья.
sentences.text_translation_en: Still looking — I'm checking a rental platform.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yòng nǎ ge píng tái?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我用贝壳，上面房子很多。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yòng Bèi ké, shàng miàn fáng zi hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation: Beyke'dan foydalanaman, unda uylar juda ko'p.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я пользуюсь Beike, там много вариантов.
sentences.text_translation_en: I use Beike — there are lots of places on it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有的贵有的便宜，看地方。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu de guì yǒu de pián yi, kàn dì fang.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zisi qimmat, ba'zisi arzon, joyiga bog'liq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что-то дорого, что-то дёшево, зависит от района.
sentences.text_translation_en: Some are expensive, some cheap — it depends on the area.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Which area are you looking in?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 公司旁边，走路十五分钟以内。
sentences.pinyin: Gōng sī páng biān, zǒu lù shí wǔ fēn zhōng yǐ nèi.
sentences.text_translation: Ish joyi yonida, piyoda o'n besh daqiqa ichida.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рядом с работой, не больше пятнадцати минут пешком.
sentences.text_translation_en: Near my company — within a fifteen-minute walk.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yì jiān fáng dà gài duō shao qián?
sentences.text_translation_en: About how much is a single room?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Chà bu duō liǎng qiān wǔ yí ge yuè.
sentences.text_translation: Oyiga taxminan ikki ming besh yuz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно две тысячи пятьсот в месяц.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 在平台能直接联系房东吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zài píng tái néng zhí jiē lián xì fáng dōng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Platformada uy egasi bilan to'g'ridan-to'g'ri bog'lansa bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: На платформе можно напрямую связаться с хозяином?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can you contact the landlord directly on the platform?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ, hái néng zài xiàn kàn fáng.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'ladi, hatto onlayn uy ko'rish ham mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно, ещё и квартиру можно посмотреть онлайн.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes — you can even view the place online.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 是啊，比找中介容易多了。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a, bǐ zhǎo zhōng jiè róng yì duō le.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, намного проще, чем искать через агента.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah — much easier than going through an agent.
sentences.speaker: B
